challenges.title: Hover Scale Button
challenges.description: Create a button that scales up to 1.1x its size on hover.

challenges.title: Simple Rotation
challenges.description: Create a div that rotates 45 degrees when clicked (using :active).

challenges.title: Card Flip Animation
challenges.description: Create a card that flips horizontally on hover using rotateY.
challenges.hint: Use rotateY(180deg) with perspective on the parent.
challenges.expected_outcome: Card flips to reveal back side.

solution.css: .scene { perspective: 800px; } .card { transition: transform 0.6s; transform-style: preserve-3d; } .card:hover { transform: rotateY(180deg); }

challenges.title: Transform Origin Pendulum
challenges.description: Create a pendulum that swings using rotate with transform-origin: top center.
challenges.hint: Set transform-origin to top center, then animate rotate.
challenges.expected_outcome: Element swings like a pendulum from the top.

solution.css: .pendulum { transform-origin: top center; transition: transform 0.5s ease-in-out; } .pendulum:hover { transform: rotate(30deg); }

challenges.title: Complex Transform Chain
challenges.description: Create an element that moves in a square path using only transform translate with JavaScript toggling classes.
challenges.hint: Use four classes with different translate values and transition.
challenges.expected_outcome: Element moves through four corners of a square.

solution.css: .mover { transition: transform 0.3s; } .pos1 { transform: translate(0, 0); } .pos2 { transform: translate(200px, 0); } .pos3 { transform: translate(200px, 200px); } .pos4 { transform: translate(0, 200px); }
